name: Mist Valley Thunder Lord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>霞の谷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ミスト・バレー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>雷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner "Mist Valley" monsters
Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 other card you control; return that target to the hand, and if you do, this card gains 500 ATK until the end of this turn.
